reason: R11 events only graduate when contracts, budgets, government orders, commercial exploration results, or institutional rules are verified.
Stage 3 needs company revenue, OP/EPS, FCF, or guidance conversion rather than news flow.
Event stocks can move 20~30% quickly; the scorer must capture price reaction without calling it Stage 3.
Repeated procurement, commercial production, long-term contract, or durable institutional revenue is required before Green.
Drill-bit failure, policy reversal, political shock, energy import shock, and low disclosure confidence can block unsafe Green.
The same policy can help one basket and hurt another; directionality must be explicit.
Price-only event rallies, short-selling squeezes, and policy-theme baskets often become 4B before Green.
